mapper.select: SELECT id, name, unit, is_powder, material_type FROM materials WHERE material_type = #{materialType} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT id, name, unit, is_powder, material_type FROM materials WHERE material_type = #{materialType} AND is_deleted = 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO materials (name, unit, is_powder, material_type) VALUES (#{name}, #{unit}, #{isPowder}, #{materialType})
mapper.update: UPDATE materials SET is_deleted = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE materials SET is_deleted = 0 WHERE id = #{id}
